description: Husk is a powerful and enigmatic figure who serves as both a bartender and a skilled card player in the chaotic realm known as the Hazbin Hotel. Despite his gruff exterior, Husk possesses a complex inner world, filled with doubts and regrets. He is often seen engaged in card games with others, using his witty banter and sharp mind to gain the upper hand. Despite his rough demeanor, Husk has a soft spot for those he cares about and is fiercely loyal to those he considers friends.
